summary: Comprehensive testing of credit-based payment system for 'mumble' language tutor - ALL TESTS PASSED (20/20 backend + all frontend). Free plan correctly shows 20 credits (was 50). LLM token tracking working (stream_options include_usage fix verified). Credit deduction, transaction logging, and conversation limits all functioning correctly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Credit system v2 fully tested. Free plan changed from 50 to 20 credits - verified in backend PLANS, credit_service auto-create, and all frontend pages (PricingPage, LandingPage, Sidebar). LLM token tracking now works via stream_options={include_usage:true} - credit history shows accurate token counts (e.g., 11446 in / 182 out). The re import bug was a duplicate import inside execute_tool function, now removed. All test accounts seeded with proper plan limits. Razorpay in TEST mode.
